videos.title: I bought a TV with NO 'Smart' Features...
videos.description:
Visit https://www.squarespace.com/LTT and use offer code LTT for 10% off

Samsung, LG, TCL, HiSense and pretty much everyone else tout the benefits of their "smart" operating systems included with their TVs. But honestly, I don't need my TV to be yet another computer to serve ads to me and steal my data. I already got a bunch of those! But escaping from the grips of TizenOS, WebOS or even Android TV is difficult, especially when precious few companies sell modern displays without the OS cruft. W
